role: Advertising Designer · Media Buyer · Account Manager
summary: Advertising design, content and paid media for SMBs at a remote agency, leading the team's creative flow.
responsibilities: Advertising design, audiovisual content and organic strategy for SMB accounts
Coordination of the team's creative flow: briefs, review and approval of deliverables
Planning and management of Meta Ads, Google Ads and TikTok Ads campaigns with KPI analysis
Direct client advisory and quality control of deliverables
achievements: More than 50 SMB accounts managed simultaneously
Seven-person creative team coordinated throughout the operation
Repeatable production and approval processes adopted by the team

summary: Communication strategies, motion graphics and audiovisual pieces for commercial and corporate accounts.
responsibilities: Communication and content strategies for accounts such as Eddie Bauer Costa Rica and Quarzo Tecnología
Digital campaign concepts and production of motion graphics and audiovisual pieces
Logo animation for the agency's portfolio
Reports and recommendations connecting visual execution with performance
achievements: Eddie Bauer Costa Rica launch (February 2026): 564,083 people reached, 1,131,832 impressions and 34,523 visits

summary: Visual direction of the brand for three years: campaigns, events and promotional content.
responsibilities: Visual direction of campaigns, events and promotional content
Design of graphic systems for social media, commercial communication and point of sale
Care for consistency between identity, photography, messages and brand experience
achievements: A coherent, recognizable identity through three years of continuous promotional activity

summary: Promotional campaigns and digital content for positioning, events and commercial communication.
responsibilities: Design of promotional campaigns and digital content for positioning and events
Adaptation of the brand's visual language to multiple formats
achievements: A visual language with hierarchy, recognition and coherence across every format

summary: Independent identity, advertising design and digital content projects on commission.
responsibilities: Identity, advertising design and digital content projects for SMBs, institutions and consumer brands
Collaboration with development and production teams on multidisciplinary projects
achievements: A network of recurring clients built over more than seven years of independent practice
